youMustAcceptTermsAndConditions: Ugomba kwemera amategeko y'ikoreshwa n'uburyo bwo gukoresha amakuru
aboutCopaTitle: Akaryo keza ko guteza imbere abanyamingambi b’Abarundi
aboutCopaDesc1: Ihiganwa ry’imigambi y’iterambere (COPA) ni kimwe mu bikorwa vy’umugambi wiyemeje kugwiza akazi n’ihinduka mu bijanje n’ubutunzi (PRETE), ufashwe mu mugongo y’ibanki y’isi yose. Intumbero yacu ni: kumenya neza, kwigisha no gushigikira amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama koperative agaragaza ko ari imbere mu migambi gusuvya ayandi mu Burundi.
aboutCopaDesc2: Ihiganwa COPA ryagenewe abantu bose bafise ibikorwa vyo kwiteza imbere, na cane cane ku bakenyezi bafise imigambi yo kwiteza imbere hamwe n’impunzi zipfuza gutanguza igikorwa co kwiyungunganya mu Burundi.
howItWorksTitle: Intambuko 5 zishikana amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama koperative mu nzira yo gukora neza
step1Desc: Ugurura ikonti yawe nshasha hanyuma wuzuze umwidondoro wawe nk’umunyamigambi mu minota mikeya.
step2Desc: Kurikirana amakuru yacu atangwa ku buntu kugira mwironkere ubumenyi buhagije ngo mushobore kwitunganiriza umugambi w'iterambere udasanzwe.
step3Desc: Andika kandi wongere urungike umugambi wawe w’iterambere imbere yuko ikiringo categekanijwe kirangira. Abahinga bacu bazoca bawusuzuma biciye mu muco ntangere.
step4Title: Ronka interano yawe mu ma mashini, ibikoresho vya kijambere hamwe n'amafaranga
step4Desc: Mu gihe mwacaguwe mu bandi, muraronka imfashanyo y’amafaranga ahuye n’umugambi washikirije hamwe n’ugukurikiranwa ku giti cawe kugira umugambi wawe uje mu ngiro.
step5Desc: Mumaze kuronswa intererano yanyu, muzokurikira inyigisho zo gutunganya amashirahamwe yanyu hamwe n’izindi nyigisho zidasanzwe zijanye n’ivyo mukeneye. Vyongeye harategekanijwe imyimenyerezo nkenerwa hamwe n’impanuro z’abahinga kugirango mushikire intumbero y’imigambi y’ishirahamwe ryanyu.
impactDesc: Uko COPA yafashije mw’irangurwa ry’imigambi mu biharuro
testimonial1Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial1Text: Kubw’umugambi COPA, narashoboye guhindura ishirahamwe rwanje rito mw’ishirahamwe riteye imbere. Inyigisho zarampaye inguvu zo kubandanya hanyuma intererano y’ibikoresho, ama mashini n'amafaranga yatumye ntera imbere. Kugez’ubu, nkoresha abakozi bagera kuri 5!
testimonial2Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial2Text: Mfashijwe na COPA, umushinga wanje wavuye mw'igitekerezo gusa wabaye igicuruzwa giteguruwe neza. Inama nahaye zampaye gushobora gutunganya imari yanje n'inkunga yoroheje kugura ibikoresho vy'ingenzi. Ubu, ndabikorera abakiriya benshi kandi naremye akazi 4!
testimonial3Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial3Text: Umugambi wa COPA wampaye ihindagurika rikomeye ku butunzi bwanje. intererano yampaye gushobora gutunganya ishirahamwe ryanje mu kwongereza ubushobozi bwanje. Ubu, ishirahamwe ryanje ryarongerekanye kandi natanze akazi ku bakozi 4 bashasha!
blogTitle1: Inama zanyu zirabaruhisha? Gerageza izi mpanuro 10
blogDesc1: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba gushimikira ku ntango.
blogTitle2: Uriko urimura ibikorwa vyawe mu yandi mahanga?
blogDesc2: Uwubitsa ibikorwa akeneye kwitaho ibibazo birenze gutora gusa!
blogDesc3: Bishobora kuba ivyavuka canke ivy'inyongera, kandi ivyakurikiye birashobora gutangaza...
blogTitle4: Ni gute twakemura amakenga mu bakenge?
blogDesc4: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba kwibandwa kurufatiro.
copyright: Uwitirirwa igikorwa: © 2026 PRETE – Ntawemerewe kwiyitirira igikorwa | Gifashwe mu mugongo n’ibanki y’isi yose
bannerTitle: COPA - Ihiganwa ry’imigambi yo kwiteza imbere
bannerDescription: Hindura umugambi wawe ube ishirahamwe riteye imbere. COPA nyunganira ifasha amashirahamwe akiri matomato (MPME) hamwe n’ama koperative yo mu Burundi biciye mu nyigisho, gukurikiranwa rimwe ryose hamwe n’intererano biciye mu mahiganwa kugira imigambi yanyu ishigwe mu ngiro.
bannerCall: Ihamagagwa rw'amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama Koperative ryo kugaragaza icese ko vyobashimisha kwinjira mu mugwi wa mbere wa COPA

project.title: Umugambi w'Akazi n'Iterambere ry'Ubutunzi
project.description: PRETE ni umugambi wa Reta y’Uburundi, ufashwe mu mugongo n’Ibanki y’isi yose, mu ntumbero yo gufasha abantu kwiteza imbere mu kugwiza ubutunzi atanumwe asigaye inyuma hamwe no kugwiza akazi mu gihugu. Hakoreshejwe amafaranga agera ku miriyoni ijana z’amadorare y’Abanyamerika (100,000,000$USD), uwo mugambi uzomara ikiringo c’imyaka 5 (2024-2028).

list: Gukarihiriza ubwenge amashirahamwe matomato (MPME) n'ama koperative
Guteza imbere ibijanye n’iterambere mu Burundi
Gufasha kugira abantu bafise imigambi bipfuza kurangura ngo baronke uko bashigikirwa
Gukomeza interambere ridakumira mu bijanye n’ubutunzi ku bakenyezi hamwe n’impunzi
Gushigikira ishirwa ry’imitahe mu bintu vyizewe bihuye n’ibihe vya none

list.title: Kworohereza amashirahamwe gushikira amasoko hamwe no gukomeza uruhererekane nyungura butunzi
Kworohereza amashirahamwe kuronswa infashanyo irama kandi atawukumiriwe
Kworohereza mu buryo burama igisata c'abikorera utwabo n'abanyamitahe
igice ca gatanu: igisata co gutabara mu gihe c'ivyago

buttons.learnMoreAboutPrete: Menya vyinshi ku bijanye na PRETE

cta.title: Uriteguriye kwinjira mu mugambi wa COPA?
cta.description: Iyandikishe ubu kugira uhabwe intererano ikwiye yo guteza imbere ubutunzi bwawe.

intro.title: COPA
intro.subtitle: Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’iterambere
intro.description1: COPA (Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’iterambere) ni uburyo nyamukuru bw’igice 1.2 ca PRETE. Ni umugambi wuzuye wo gushigikira abanyamigambi b’Abarundi uhuza inyigisho, ubuhanuzi n’imfashanyo.
intro.description2: COPA iha abafise imigambi ifashe akaryo kadasanzwe ko gukarihiriza ubumenyi bwabo no gushikira imfashanyo itasubizwa kugira bashire mu ngiro ivyiyumviro vyabo.

whyParticipate.title: Kubera iki wokwitabira?
list: Inyigisho mu buhinga bwo kwikorera ivyawe

copaInfo.label: Intumbero nyamukuru
copaInfo.value1: Intumbero nyamukuri ni uguteza imbere amashirahamwe mato mato y’abikorera ivyabo

copaInfo.label: Intumbero zitomoye
value1: Inyigisho ku bahinga b’amashirahamwe y’abikorera ivyabo;
Gutora biciye mw’ihiganwa amashirahamwe azoronswa intererano;
Imfashanyo y’ubuhinga ku mashirahamwe azoronswa intererano ;
Ihinganwa ry' imigambi yo kwiteza imbere;
Ikuriranwa ry’ishirwa mu ngira y’umugambi w’iterambere, hamwe n’ibijanye no kumenyera no kwihanganira ingorane zamuka kw'ihindagurika ry’ikirere.

copaInfo.label: Ibice vy’ibikorwa vyerekeye  umugambi wa COPA
copaInfo.value1: Ihanahana ry’ibidandazwa vyahinguwe mu burimyi, Inganda z’uburimyi (ivyakozwe mu mata, mu nkoko, mu burimyi bw’amafi, mu vyamwa n’ibindi bice bifise inyungu bwinshi), ii) ubucukuzi bw’amabuye y’agaciro, iii) n’ibindi bikorwa bijanye n’uburimyi (harimwo ibijanye n’ingenzi hamwe n’ubuhinga bwa none).

copaInfo.label: Igihe co gushira mu ngiro umugambi wa COPA
Igitigiri c’imigwi
copaInfo.value1: Imigwi 6 ifise ikiringo kiri hagati y’amezi 12 na 18 ku mugwi umwe umwe.

copaInfo.label: Amashirahamwe yikorera ivyabo azoronswa intererano
copaInfo.value1: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative (harimwo n’ayasanzwe n’atemewe n’amategeko), ubuhinga bwo guteza imbere urwego rw’abikorera ivyabo, ni ukuvuga:
value2: Gutora vy’ibanze: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative 1200 (harimwo 50% vy’amashirahamwe mato mato arongowe n’abagore na 20% arongowe n’impunzi)
Gutora biciye mw’ihiganwa: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative 600 (harimwo 50% vy’amashirahamwe mato mato arongowe n’abagore na 6,6% arongowe n’impunzi)

timeline.sectionSubtitle: Uburyo bw’ishirwa mu ngiro rya COPA
timeline.description: Ishirwa mu ngiro rya COPA ritegekanijwe mu bice bibiri nyamukuru: gutora vy’ibanze hamwe no gutorwa biciye mw’ihiganwa ry’imigambi.

phases.phase: Ihamagarwa ry’amashirahamwe mato mato yipfuza guhiganisha imigambi
phases.description: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative ahuye n’ingingo ngenderwako kandi yipfuza kwiyandikisha mw’ihiganishwa ry’imigambi aratumiwe kwiyandikisha ku rubuga ngurukana bumenyi rwa COPA nyunganira : www.copa-prete.bi.

phases.phase: Umwihwezo w'ibisabwa vyatanzwe n’amashirahamwe yiyandikishije hamwe n'itangazwa ry’ivyavuyemwo
phases.description:
Kuri iyo ntambwe, ibisabwa vyaronswe birasuzumwa hakurikijwe ko vyubahiriza ingingo ngenderwako zo kwakigwa no kwemererwa.
Ivyavuye mu gutora vy’ibanze bimenyeshwa abiyandikishije bose (abatsinze canke abatatsinze). Abatowe muri iyo ntambwe bemererwa kubandanya mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa no kwigishwa gutegura neza umugambi w’iterambere, kandi abatashoboye gutorwa bashobora gusubira gusaba mu migwi ikurikira mu gihe bubahirije ingingo ngenderwako zo kwakirwa no kwemererwa.

phases.phase: Iyinjizwa mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa mu nteguro y’imigambi y’iterambere
phases.description: Abatowe barashigikirwa mu gutegura imigambi wabo y’iterambere hamwe n’ivyigwa vyerekeye gukoresha ubuhinga bwa none no kubungabunga ibidukikije n’imibano.
Igihe co gutanga umugambi w’iterambere kizotangura ubwo nyene inyuma y’igice co gushigikira abatowe mw’itorwa ry’ibanze. Imigambi y’iterambere yashikirijwe izosuzumwa n’umugwi b’abahinga bigenga.

phases.phase: Gutora abatsinze hamwe no gushikiriza ivyavuyemwo
phases.description: Ibikorwa vy’isuzuma y’imigambi y’iterambere biheze, hazotorwa imigambi myiza gusumba iyindi, abazotsinda, hamwe n’abatazotsinda, bazomenyeshwa ivyavuyemwo.

Iyo ntererano, iri hagati y’amadolari y’abanyamerika 10.000 na 20.000, izotangwa mu buryo bw’ibikoresho vy’ubuhinga (ama mashini, ibikoresho, icemezo, n’ibindi) n’uburyo bwo gukoresha (nk’imishahara, ibikoresho vya mbere, ibindi bikoresho vy’abakozi, amahera yo gupanga, umuyagankuba, n’ibijanye no gusanura ibikoresho, hamwe n’ibindi).
Imigambi y’abatsinze izosuzuma kubijanye no kubungabunga ibidukikije n’imibano kugira hubahirizwe ibisabwa n’amategeko imbere y’uko bashikirizwa intererano zabo.

phases.phase: Iyinjizwa mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa inyuma yo kuronswa intererano
phases.description: Inyuma yo kuronswa intererano, abayitsindiye bazoronswa inyingisho mu bijanye n’uburongozi no gutunganya amashirahamwe yabo. Vyongeye, bazoronka inyigisho zidasanzwe hamwe no gukurikiranwa n’abahinga muri ivyo vyose bazokenera kugira amashirahamwe yabo ashikire ihangiro biyemeje.

list.title: Inyigisho
list.desc: Gukarisha ubushobozi mu rwiyemezamirimo no mu micungararo biciye mu nyigisho zibereye, zitangwa ku kibanza canke kuri internet.

list.title: Ihiganwa
list.desc: Isuzuma ritomoye kandi ridahengamye ry’imigambi y’iterambere rikozwe n’abahinga bigenga hisunzwe ibipimo bisobanutse.

list.title: Intererano
list.desc: Gutanga intererano y’uguhuza intererano ku batsinze kugira bashire mu ngiro imigambi yabo.

section.title: Ni nde ashobora kwitaba uwo mugambi?

section.description: COPA yugururiwe MPME zose zemewe canke ziri mu nzira yo kwemerwa, ariko hagashirwa imbere cane cane imigwi ikurikira:

list.label: Abakenyezi banyamigambi
list.desc: Amashirahamwe arongowe n’abakenyezi aronka amanota y’inyongera mu isuzuma

list.label: Abanyamigambi b’impunzi
list.desc: Impunzi zanditswe mu Burundi zemerewe kuja muri uwo mugambi

list.desc: Urwaruka rufise imigambi mishasha kandi ifashe

list.label: Ingaruka nziza ku bidukikije
list.desc: Imigambi ifise ico ifasha ku kirere no ku bidukikije

applicationSubmitted.title: Kwemeza ubusabe
applicationSubmitted.notification: Muzoronswa ubutumwa kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS igihe ivyavuye mu gice ca mbere vyasohotse.
applicationSubmitted.confirmation: Turabamenyesha ko twakiriye neza dosiye yanyu y'ubusabe kandi turabashimira ku nyungu mufise kuri COPA Nyunganira.
applicationSubmitted.review: Umugwi ujejwe guhitamwo uzosuzuma dosiye yanyu hanyuma tuzobamenyesha ivyavuye mu gusuzuma.
applicationSubmitted.contact: Nimba mufise ikibazo, twandikire kuri contact@copa-prete.bi canke mutere telefone kuri +257 62 766 766.

intro.title: Raba niba ufise uburenganzira bwo kwitabira COPA
intro.description: COPA ifunguriwe MPME zuzuza ibisabwa bikurikira. Raba niba uboneye mbere yo kwiyandikisha.

recevabilityItems: Ikete ry’ugusaba ryatanzwe mu bihe vyateguwe?
Umusaba atanga icemezo c’ukuba i Burundi?
Umusaba yuzuye neza ifishi yo kuri interineti?
Umusaba yatanze inyandiko zari zisabwa muhamagararo ryo gutanga ibitekerezo?
Umusaba ari mw’ibazo c’amahitamwo abiri aravuzwe?
Umusaba yaratsinze mu myigenderanire ya COPA y’imbere?

eligibilityItems.label: Izina ry’Itegeko ry'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative
eligibilityItems.desc: Yanditswe mu Bwanditsi bw’Ubucuruzi (RC) canke muri ANACOOP, canke ifise NIF canke ifise icemezo c’ukumenyekana muri komine canki akarere kemeza ko ico kigo gifise umwaka umwe ushize mu buzima ku munsi w’ugusaba ku binyamigambi bitari mu tegeko.

eligibilityItems.label: Imico myiza y'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative n’canke abayobozi bayo
eligibilityItems.desc: Ico kigo canke uwuhagarariye mu buryo bw’itegeko ntibagomba kuba barahatiwe kubera ukwiyonkora ku mategeko y’Uburundi.

eligibilityItems.label: Ibice vy’Ibikorwa vyemerewe n'umugambi wa COPA
eligibilityItems.desc: Agri-business, Agro-industrie (urugero Amata, Inkoko, Uburorerwa bw’Amafi, Ivya Musi ndetse n’ibindi bice bifise ubushobozi bunini), ii) Ivy'ubutare na iii) serivisi bijanye n’agri-business (harimwo ivy'ingenzi n’ubuhinga ngurukana bumenyi).

eligibilityItems.label: Aho ry'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative ari
Ikibanza c’uwufise umugambi
eligibilityItems.desc: Ufise umugambi ategerezwa kuba ari we uwuhagarariye mu buryo bw’itegeko rya ry'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative.

eligibilityItems.label: Uko intererano ingana
eligibilityItems.desc: Intererano izotangwa iri hagati y’amadorari y'amanyamerika 10 000 na 20 000.

eligibilityItems.label: Kurondera ibibazo vyo kutabangikanya inyungu
eligibilityItems.desc: Abayobozi b'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative ntibategerezwa kuba bari mu ngorane ku bisabwa n’Itegeko n°100/22 ryo ku wa 7 Gitugutu 2010 hamwe n’Inyubakwa y’Ahandura n’Umuganda (CGES) y’umugambi wa PRETE. Ukurondera kumenya neza ibibera mu mashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative.

eligibilityItems.label: Kutabangikanya inyungu z'akazi
eligibilityItems.desc: Uwusaba ntategerezwa kuba mu ngorane zo kubangikanya inyungu z'akazi.

options.title: Amahitamo 1 — Isosiyete ifise amategeko
items: Ifishi yo gusaba ku rubuga yuzuye neza.
Copy y'indangamuntu canke ikarita y’impunzi y’umuyobozi wemewe yemejwe n’inzego z’Uburundi kandi ikiri valid.
Urupapuro rw’amategeko rugaragaza nta mananiza mu mezi atatu ashize y’umuyobozi w’isosiyete.
Ibaruwa yo gushiraho umuyobozi niba atandukanye n’uwo wanditse mu Rwandiko rw’ubucuruzi.
Copy y’Icyangombwa c’Ubucuruzi canke icyemezo cyo kwiyandikisha ca kooperatifi canke NIF ya MPME.
Raporo z’imari z’amezi 6 ashize za MPME. Raporo za mobile money na registre y’igurishwa zirakirwa.

options.title: Amahitamo 2 — Isosiyete itagira amategeko (Ishirahamwe ritisunze amategeko n’ishirahamwe ritarandikishwa mu gitabo c’amategeko agenga amashirahamwe yikorera ivyayo (canke koperative itaremezwa n’ikigo ANACOOP gisanzwe kigenzura amakoperative ku rwego rw’igihugu) kandi rikaba rirangura ibikorwa vyayo aho ariho hose mu gihugu.)
items: Ifishi yo gusaba ku rubuga yuzuye neza.
Icyemezo cyemeza ko isosiyete imaze nibura umwaka umwe ku munsi wo gusaba.
Copy y’indangamuntu y’umuyobozi canke ikarita y’impunzi yemejwe n’inzego z’Uburundi kandi ikiri valid.
Urupapuro rw’amategeko rugaragaza nta mananiza mu mezi atatu ashize y’umuyobozi w’isosiyete.
Raporo z’imari z’amezi 6 ashize z’umuyobozi w’isosiyete. Raporo za mobile money na registre y’igurishwa zirakirwa.

cta.title: Ufise ikibazo ku bisabwa ?
cta.description: Umugwi wacu uragufasha kumenya neza ibisabwa.

success.title: Ikirego cawe cakiriwe
success.message: Urakoze kuduha aya makuru. Dufata buri kirego canke ikibazo n’uburemere bwinshi kandi mu kinyegero.
notifications: Muzoronswa inyishu mu kiringo c’iminsi 15 y’akazi.
Ikirego cawe gikorwa mu kinyegero cose.
Bika inomero ndangakirego kugira ushobore gukurikirana aho kigeze.
success.vbgNotification: 🆘 Ibibazo vya VBG/EAS-HS bihabwa ubwa mbere.

intro.title: Menyesha ikibazo canke ikitagenda neza
intro.description: COPA yiyemeje kwakira no gutorera inyishu ivyiyumviro vyanyu mu kinyegero no mu buryo bubereye. Nimba wabonye ikibazo, ugucurika canke imyifato idakwiriye, nutebuke kubitumenyesha.

description.placeholder:
Insiguro ido n’ido y’ivyabaye *
Sigura neza ivyabaye, ryari, vyagenze gute hamwe n’abari babirimwo...

files.hint: Impapuro, amafoto, captures d’écran — ntibirenge dosiye 5, 10 Mo imwe imwe

consent.label: Ndemeye ko amakuru yanje afatwa mu kinyegero n’umugwi wa COPA hisunzwe poritike yo gukingira amakuru.

profileNote: Mwuzuze mwitonze amakuru yose asabwa. Azokoreshwa mu gusuzuma ubusabe bwanyu mw’ihiganwa COPA.

verifyBanner.title: Suzuma amakuru yawe
verifyBanner.description: Imbere yo kurungika ubusabe bwawe, banza usuzume ko amakuru yose washizemwo ari yo kandi ko impapuro zose zisabwa zashizwe ku rubuga.

forgotPasswordPage.success: Ubutumwa bwo gusubiramwo ijambo banga bwemejwe.

resetPassword.invalidDesc: Uyu murongo wo guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga ntukora canke wahezagiwe.
